description: At the Playground, Skye confides in May that she believes something is wrong with Coulson, noticing his recent secretiveness and stress. May, outwardly dismissive, later confronts Coulson privately and notes he is overdue for an episode. Coulson admits to feeling the symptoms returning. May monitors him as he succumbs to his compulsions, documenting him as he begins carving alien symbols. The consequences of his transformation loom for the team.

transcript.line: I need to know. So do you. Pick it up.
No. It let you live. There's a difference.
Bring me my daughter, and I'll show the both of you.
